Headline: Blue and Pink Line Delays
ShortDescription: Blue and Pink Line trains are running with significant delays following an earlier police activity near Racine.  Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue and Pink Line trains are running with significant delays following an earlier police activity near Racine. 

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #85A North Central Temporary Reroute near Touhy/Lehigh
ShortDescription: 85A North Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Touhy/Lehigh, due to street blockage near Touhy/Lehigh.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#85A North Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Touhy/Lehigh, due to street blockage near Touhy/Lehigh.

Northbound buses will operate via Central, Touhy, Caldwell and Central over the normal route.

Southbound buses will operate via Central, Caldwell, Touhy, Central over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
